seoTitle: Pinjarra vs Pink Lake — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pinjarra and Pink Lake. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pinjarra vs Pink Lake: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pinjarra and Pink Lake.
heading: Pinjarra vs Pink Lake — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pinjarra, Western Australia and Pink Lake, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pinjarra has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Pink Lake (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pinjarra or Pink Lake safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pinjarra has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Pink Lake scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pinjarra scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Pink Lake scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pinjarra or Pink Lake?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pinjarra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
